executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification remains blocked by marketing independent fail on primary-repo outcome evidence, and live runtime still carries a restart residue on reddit-monitor.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify green until marketing produces a fresh independent pass backed by measurable Codeberg movement and the reddit-monitor restart residue is superseded by a clean rerun or explicit reclassification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.reddit-monitor: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart

findings.title: Marketing remains the only outcome-owned red loop
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification is still fail and the unresolved blocker remains primary-repo adoption measurement pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway still carries one interrupted-job restart residue
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows no jobs currently running, but reddit-monitor still exposes lastError=cron: job interrupted by gateway restart.
findings.root_cause: Gateway restart residue still remains in one live job state and should stay visible until superseded.
findings.recommended_fix: Clear or explicitly reclassify the reddit-monitor residue with a fresh successful rerun instead of silently treating runtime state as clean.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on local freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Architecture independent verification is qualified_pass, the verifier artifact is pass, and health monitor localizes current non-architecture issues to marketing only.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates remain coherent; the remaining outcome blocker stays external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after any future material architecture/runtime refresh.

findings.title: Docs verifier and shared market-intelligence reuse remain independently verifiable
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier is pass and required runtime consumers still load or intentionally skip the shared market-intelligence artifact with recorded proof.
findings.root_cause: Shared evidence contracts remain coherent across loops.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Wait for a marketing lane that can move primary-repo adoption and rerun marketing independent verification on the resulting evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is still the only outcome-owner red domain after the architecture-side runtime checks were refreshed.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining blocker or sharpens the next marketing repair target.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Clear or explicitly reclassify the reddit-monitor restart residue
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Direct live inspection still shows one restart residue even though no jobs are currently running.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents false-clean runtime claims and keeps live-topology reporting honest.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This guard prevents persisted-history drift or stale clean snapshots from being misreported as live state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops topology noise and stale runtime assumptions from reappearing as architecture misinformation.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed loop-integrity state and confirmed agent-architecture-watchdog remains status=ok while marketing fails closed on outcome evidence.
Refreshed health monitor state and reconfirmed that live unresolved issues are marketing-owned only.
Replaced the stale five-job restart residue claim with the current live view: 20 enabled jobs, 0 active runners, and 1 restart residue job(s): reddit-monitor.
Health monitor increased timeout ceilings for marketing-momentum-watchdog, ralph-workflow-docs-verifier-supervisor, repo-adoption-tracker, and marketing-workflow-audit during this refresh window.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Post-rerun clearance or explicit reclassification of the reddit-monitor restart residue.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green here only means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
Independent live verification in this snapshot saw 20 total jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, and 1 live last-error residue job(s).
The remaining blocker is still marketing outcome evidence, with the single restart residue kept explicit as runtime watch-state.
